title: Pan-Seared Croatian Trout with Fresh Salad
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the freshness of a salad with the rich taste of pan-seared trout.

ingredients.name: Fresh Salad Mix (arugula, lettuce, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: Season the trout fillets with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add the trout fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the salad by combining the fresh mix, cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Once the trout is cooked, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the trout with the fresh salad and garnish with chopped parsley.
Drizzle with additional lemon juice and olive oil to taste.
